name: 在 RDP 桌面启动浏览器窗口
description: 在 QwenPaw 容器已有的 Xvfb/xfce4 桌面（默认 DISPLAY=:1）中启动 Chromium 窗口。运行后，用 mstsc 连接 RDP 桌面即可看到浏览器界面，并可手动登录网页。适合需要人工处理验证码、扫码、登录等场景。注意：这不会把当前 agent 的 browser_use 页面搬进 RDP 桌面；它是在 RDP 桌面内额外启动一个浏览器窗口。
code:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

BROWSER_URL="{{browser_url}}"
BROWSER_DISPLAY="{{browser_display}}"
BROWSER_USER_DATA_DIR="{{browser_user_data_dir}}"
BROWSER_WINDOW_SIZE="{{browser_window_size}}"
BROWSER_CDP_PORT="{{browser_cdp_port}}"
CHROMIUM_BIN="{{chromium_binary}}"

if [ -z "$BROWSER_URL" ]; then
  echo "browser_url is required."
  exit 1
fi

if ! command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "apt-get not found; this script is intended for Debian/Ubuntu based QwenPaw containers."
  exit 1
fi

if [ ! -x "$CHROMIUM_BIN" ]; then
  apt-get update -qq
  apt-get install -y -qq --no-install-recommends chromium
fi

mkdir -p "$BROWSER_USER_DATA_DIR"

# Stop any previous Chromium launched by this supervisor program to avoid duplicate windows.
if command -v pkill >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  pkill -f "--user-data-dir=$BROWSER_USER_DATA_DIR" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
fi

cat > /etc/supervisor/conf.d/browser-desktop.conf <<CONF
[program:browser-desktop]
command=/bin/sh -c 'export DISPLAY="${BROWSER_DISPLAY}"; export BROWSER_URL="${BROWSER_URL}"; export USER_DATA_DIR="${BROWSER_USER_DATA_DIR}"; export WINDOW_SIZE="${BROWSER_WINDOW_SIZE}"; export CDP_PORT="${BROWSER_CDP_PORT}"; XSOCK="/tmp/.X11-unix/X\${DISPLAY#:}"; for i in \$(seq 1 200); do [ -S "\$XSOCK" ] && break; sleep 0.1; done; exec "$CHROMIUM_BIN" --no-sandbox --disable-dev-shm-usage --disable-gpu --window-size="\$WINDOW_SIZE" --user-data-dir="\$USER_DATA_DIR" --remote-debugging-port="\$CDP_PORT" "\$BROWSER_URL"'
autostart=true
autorestart=true
priority=30
stopasgroup=true
killasgroup=true
stderr_logfile=/var/log/browser-desktop.err.log
stdout_logfile=/var/log/browser-desktop.out.log
CONF

if command -v supervisorctl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  supervisorctl reread >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
  supervisorctl update >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
  supervisorctl restart browser-desktop >/dev/null 2>&1 || supervisorctl start browser-desktop >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
fi

echo "Browser desktop launch setup complete."
echo "  URL: $BROWSER_URL"
echo "  DISPLAY: $BROWSER_DISPLAY"
echo "  User data dir: $BROWSER_USER_DATA_DIR"
echo "  CDP port: $BROWSER_CDP_PORT"
echo ""
echo "Open mstsc to the RDP desktop and you should see Chromium."

browser_cdp_port.label: 浏览器 CDP 端口（可选调试）
